issues.description: SearchDeck action is present but missing required filter conditions: must specify CardType={Supernovas} and exclude [More Pizza!!]
Action type should reflect the 'look at 5 cards' mechanic which is a deck search/peek operation, not a generic SearchDeck without parameters
Second trigger 'Trigger' with DrawCard is unexplained and not supported by card text; the effect describes revealing and adding cards, not drawing
Filter must include CardType condition for {Supernovas} and CardName exclusion for [More Pizza!!]; currently set to 'Any' which is incorrect
Missing the mechanic of placing remaining cards at bottom of deck in any order after selection

suggestedDsl.effectText: Look at 5 cards from the top of your deck; reveal up to 1 {Supernovas} type card other than [More Pizza!!] and add it to your hand. Then, place the rest at the bottom of your deck in any order.
